title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Manipal University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
